4 One of the following sequences: (a) BIO 311C, 311D, or BIO 315H and 325H. (b) CH 301 or 301C and 302 or 302C; or (c) PHY 303K and 105M, 301 and 101L, or 317K and 105M; and 303L and 105N, 316 and 116L, or 317L and 105N. 2 courses none 2 courses No courses used Show/Hide
